title: artemisia campestris var. canadensis
intro: Artemisia campestris var. canadensis, also known as Canada mugwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as nausea, diarrhea, and stomach cramps, due to its anti-inflammatory and carminative effects. The health benefits of Canada mugwort include its ability to ease menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Canada mugwort include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
